query: I'm a consultant pitching a project to a client — help me create the alignment document so we agree before starting work.
Build the WDS alignment pitch: the realization, why it matters, paths explored, recommended solution, value, and cost of inaction.
I need stakeholder sign-off before kicking off this project — produce the alignment document and signoff.
Write the strategic product brief — vision, positioning, target users and success criteria for the new app.
Onboard me to WDS and figure out greenfield vs brownfield and which phase to start in.
Map our business goals to user psychology and build the trigger map with personas.
